title: DCP Task
description: A unit of work within a project. Dependencies between tasks are expressed exclusively via the canonical Dependency entity, never inline on a Task.

status.description: State vocabulary (not transitions): proposed, todo, in_progress, blocked, in_review, completed, cancelled. Tolerate-and-pass unknown values.

priority.description: Descriptive label only; NOT a scheduler directive. DCP defines no behaviour over it. Controlled vocabulary: low, normal, high, critical.

responsible_party.description: Descriptive, UNTRUSTED project metadata. Conveys NO identity, authority, obligation, or authorization. Free-form opaque label; never an authenticated principal.
